description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the cirrusci/flutter:stable Docker image and defines three stages: build, analyze, and test. Add a global before_script that runs flutter pub get and flutter clean before every job. In the build stage, add a job named build that runs flutter build aot, is limited to merge requests via only: [merge_requests], and is assigned to runners tagged shared. No services, caches, artifacts, or deployment targets are configured.
